revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-060

The ratio of the total energy delivered by a source in a given interval of time to the energy that would have been delivered if the peak load had been maintained throughout the same interval of time.


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Load factor}}
